scores.justification: Machine-checked method with honestly scoped modeling decisions; the definitional character of the headline collapse remains confronted in Remark 4.6; v11 diff is three prose edits, leaving the proof base unchanged and re-verified by this pass's artifact gate (fresh lake build, clean).

80 kernel-verified results, 0 sorries, 1 inert axiom; per-file line/declaration arithmetic exact; the external artifact was rebuilt from scratch under the #663 gate this pass: lake build exit 0, 3068 jobs, exactly the 9 expected #eval demo lines.
Central claim displayed as a one-sentence quote in the introduction; eight numbered one-sentence contributions with section pointers; the compressed ~262-word abstract names every headline result.

Wehmeier line engaged substantively and accurately in Section 5, complementarity framing now stated once with Section 4.6 reduced to the technical contrast plus a pointer; scherf2025 demoted to 'the most directly comparable attempt' per the v10 note; remaining prior work engaged on its merits.

Pinned toolchain, public repo, CI, step-by-step build appendix; this pass executed the reproduction claim end-to-end via the #663 artifact gate (declared lake build, fresh worktree, clean) and reproduced the paper build to a byte-stable .aux fixpoint.
Both TikZ figures self-contained at caption level, black-only per venue with pattern-based encodings; appendix tables have meaningful headers and booktabs alignment; untouched in v11.

Both v10 deductions resolved on the artifact: the mis-drafted 'Neither work' sentence now reads with this paper's development as its unambiguous subject, and the Section 4.3 version-diff leftover is version-agnostic ('The three results of this subsection'). Flow intact, hedging calibrated, render pass clean (0 overfull, 0 broken refs).

23/23 cites resolve with no orphans (re-checked); entries complete and consistent; prose claims about sources accurate where checkable against the on-disk references/ notes. The carried-over Fogelin 1976/1987 dating preference (declined this pass in changelog.md) is a convention nit, not a hygiene defect.

v10's residual duplication closed: the complementarity framing appears once (Section 5) and Section 4.6 ends in a pointer; abstract stays compressed (~262 words); the conclusion isolates two consequences rather than re-narrating the result set.

findings.evidence_span: Bibliography, fogelin1987 / Section 5 first prose mention
findings.rationale: Carried over from v9/v10, declined in the v11 changelog as out of the operator-directed polish scope: prose credits Fogelin with initiating the debate; the critique first appeared in the 1976 first edition, while the entry cites the 1987 second edition (first edition noted parenthetically).
findings.suggested_fix: Cite as Fogelin (1976/1987) at first prose mention during submission mechanics.

findings.rationale: With scherf2025 softened to 'the most directly comparable attempt', the closing clause 'demonstrating that complete philosophical systems can be formalized' could be calibrated one notch further for an archive-only artifact.
